description: Implement this requested Zod v3 contract change: add a required abstract schemaTypeLabel(): string member to the shared ZodType base without editing individual schema classes. The business goal is a public schemaTypeLabel API that returns a short lowercase type label for any schema.
Add a one-line comment at the very top of the schema helper utilities file summarizing its purpose. Do not change any code or any other file.
Add a one-line comment at the very top of the error-formatting helper file summarizing its purpose. Do not change any code or any other file.
The validation helper addIssueToContext in packages/zod/src/v3/helpers/parseUtil.ts has an unclear name. Rename it to reportIssue and update all of its call sites in the shared Zod v3 types module.
